## Checklist
- [ ] TypeScript compiles with zero errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] ESLint passes with zero warnings (`npx next lint`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] BrowserWorker health check passes
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New logic has error handling (no bare catch blocks)
- [ ] Sensitive changes reviewed by @xps-admin

## Security
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No new CVEs introduced
- [ ] Rate limiting applied to new API routes
- [ ] Auth guards applied to new protected routes
